summary: Made two surgical seam edits: carried a concrete residue from Chapter 6 into the opening and added the tier-three bilingual announcement to the closing beat to hand off more cleanly into Chapter 8's rescan scene.
edits: Revised the opening sentence to carry forward the waste-log duplicate and the boy's name from the prior chapter.
Adjusted the final tier-three corridor beat to include the synthetic English-and-Spanish announcement that leads into the next chapter.
